context: Rules used when reimbursing out-of-pocket expenses for Harmon's Heritage Cuts and the Ridgemont booster club, reviewed with Pop Brennan on the 15th and with Maria Collins (CPA) each quarter.
policy_name: Harmon's Heritage Cuts Expense Reimbursement Policy

validation_rules.notes: Itemized receipt required for any expense over $25.
Purchases at or above $150 need Henry's sign-off before reimbursement.
validation_rules.requirement: Charge at or above the $150 approval threshold

validation_rules.notes: Player equipment and camp costs route to the booster fund, not shop books.
validation_rules.requirement: Booster or team expense mixed with shop expense

validation_rules.notes: Submit within 30 days of the transaction date.
validation_rules.requirement: Submitted more than 30 days after purchase

validation_rules.notes: Only one valid receipt allowed per charge.
